# trss-breadcrumbs

Breadcrumbs help the site visitor navigate between the page they are on and the site homepage by showing a linked folder path. Breadcrumbs should appear near the page title.

Truss expects breadcrumbs to be an HTML list (`ul` or `ol`). Optionally, the last list item can be the current page. Set `trailing_link` to `false` if you don't want it to look like a link.

<!-- Auto Generated Below -->

## Properties

| Property        | Attribute       | Description                                        | Type      | Default |
| --------------- | --------------- | -------------------------------------------------- | --------- | ------- |
| `trailing_link` | `trailing_link` | Should the last item in the list look like a link? | `boolean` | `true`  |
